overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic cyberpunk downtown during morning hours. The clip features driving under elevated highway structures, stopping at intersections with digital billboards, passing through underpasses, and navigating streets decorated with colorful overhead banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway approach with elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: vehicle slows down approaching intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: driving forward on multi-lane road approaching an intersection with elevated highways overhead

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large concrete and steel elevated highway structure spanning across the road
modern glass and steel industrial building with multiple levels
illuminated digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives on a wide multi-lane road during bright morning sunlight, approaching an intersection dominated by massive elevated highway ramps. The scene features modern industrial architecture and digital billboards with sparse traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and large digital advertising displays

events.description: enters open intersection with visible crosswalk markings and pedestrian activity
vehicle stops at red traffic light to wait for crossing pedestrian
pedestrian finishes crossing and vehicle begins to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light waiting for pedestrian to clear the crosswalk before proceeding

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying 'WIDE OPEN' text with colorful graphics
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on road surface
tall palm tree visible near the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a sunlit urban intersection featuring a prominent 'WIDE OPEN' digital billboard. After stopping for a red light to allow a pedestrian to cross, the vehicle proceeds through the crosswalk area surrounded by brick buildings and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass beneath elevated highway with concrete walls

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath elevated highway structure
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to darker shadowed underpass
exits underpass back into open sunlight

agents.ego_description: driving through the short covered section beneath the elevated highway

entered.detail: underside of elevated highway forming a tunnel-like ceiling over the road
gray concrete retaining wall with weathered surface and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The vehicle briefly passes through a covered underpass beneath the elevated highway, transitioning from bright morning sun into shadowed concrete enclosure with graffiti-covered walls, then emerging back into daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with overhead decorative lighting and elevated transit tubes

events.description: enters street section covered by colorful hanging banner decorations
navigates through moderate traffic at intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: driving steadily under colorful overhead decorations through commercial district with various vehicles

entered.detail: rows of colorful striped fabric banners hanging across the street creating a canopy effect
futuristic enclosed transit tube structure running above the street with green and orange coloring
large digital screen displaying pink and purple neon graphics

segments.scene_description: Driving through a vibrant commercial street shaded by colorful overhead banners, the vehicle passes under an elevated transit tube structure. The area features dense neon signage, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic moving through multiple intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with large billboards and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turns into new street section featuring different billboard advertisements and architecture
vehicle navigates around other traffic while maintaining forward progress

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy commercial streets with various billboards and storefronts

notable_agents.action: red van driving ahead in traffic

entered.detail: large vertical billboard featuring red oni mask design with Japanese text
tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
multiple neon signs and storefront displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through a dense commercial area characterized by a prominent red oni mask billboard, graffiti-covered concrete walls, and various neon storefront signs. Traffic remains moderate as the vehicle navigates the urban canyon environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic downtown that transitions from wide, sun-drenched industrial roads into a dense, neon-lit commercial canyon. It begins on a multi-lane road under bright morning sunlight, approaching an intersection dominated by massive elevated highway ramps and digital billboards. As the vehicle stops for a pedestrian at a sunlit crosswalk flanked by palm trees, the scene then shifts into the shadowed concrete enclosure of a graffiti-covered underpass before emerging back into the daylight. The camera continues forward through a vibrant street shaded by colorful overhead banners and an elevated transit tube, where the lighting becomes more saturated with neon signage. Finally, the environment tightens into a dense urban corridor characterized by a prominent red oni mask billboard and graffiti-strewn walls as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic.
